name: skillsets
description: Personal collection of model-agnostic engineering and research skills for Claude, Codex, and Antigravity.

interface.longDescription: A personal collection of model-agnostic engineering and research skills for Claude, Codex, and Antigravity. Each skill is a self-contained, disciplined workflow covering software architecture, UI/UX and frontend, data architecture, Linux device drivers, real-time and dataplane systems, technology leadership, and academic research.
